DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-31-2017 Overruled
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
David Forna, Esq. (415-775-0891) of Sacramento and Foran for Plaintiff.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT DANIEL MENDOZA's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT OF PLAINTIFF TRINH LAM.

Defendant Daniel Mendoza's demurrer to all the causes of action alleged in the first amended complaint filed by plaintiff Trinh Lam is overruled as to all causes of action. The gravamen of each of Ms. Lam's causes of action is Mr. Mendoza's alleged failure to pay money owing to Ms. Lam, not a breach of any promise of marriage. The parties' relationship is only relevant to elements of Ms. Lam's claims because the conclusion of that relationship bears on when the alleged obligation to pay arose.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. =(302/HK)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Reyes F. Hunter, CSR#6576, rhunter@sftc.org, Reported. =(302/HK)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT

No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT DANIEL MENDOZA and JOSEPHINE MENDOZA's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is off calendar as moot. An amended complaint was filed on July 13, 2017.

Judge: Angela Bradstreet; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D302)
